title: 菊花賞の後に・現実は

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Kikuka Sho over, King Halo must face
reality as the crowd hollers for Special Week and
Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo laments her loss and her failure to be
recognized, and doubts if she's really first-rate.
But then, Kawakami Princess and a few others
offer their encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing I've been with her the whole time, King
Halo rests her head on my shoulder. We remain
that way until her tears stop flowing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following my suggestion, she resolves to not
strive for the approval of others but to become
her own version of first-rate.
